message:
feat(tui): explainability cockpit IA types with 4-panel taxonomy and 12 tests (1mfw3.3.1 prep)

Design the information architecture for the explainability cockpit overlay:
CockpitPanel enum (DiffStrategy/ResizeRegime/BudgetHealth/Timeline),
data contracts for each panel, timeline event feed with VecDeque eviction,
empty-state policies, and CockpitState aggregate. All types are pure data
structures that will be wired to the inspector overlay once 1mfw3.3 unblocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
